Library.description: Soa library for change management scenarios in NGP.
Library.name: Mpc0SoaManufacturingCM

Library.description: New library for change management scenarios in NGP.
Library.name: Mpc0manufacturingCM

ParameterInfo.description: The list of ECN objects of type ChangeNoticeRevision.

Operation.description: This service operation gives information related to impacted objects such as activity, hull number etc for given list of Engineering Change Notice (ECNs). For each hull number, impacted activities along with Manufacturing Change Notice (MCNs) are returned and mcnIndication are returned
Operation.name: getEcnImpactAnalysisInfo
Operation.useCase:
Usecase1:
User is notified of an ECN having problem items and impacted items. User wants to see impact analysis report for the ECN. So user will click on the impact analysis icon in the ECN page to see the report. After clicking on the impact analysis icon, user will see impact analysis report for the ECN. This will contain the impacted hull numbers and impacted activities per hull. Report will also contain Manufacturing Change Notice(MCN) per hull number (if created).

OperationParameter.description: The list of ECN objects of type ChangeNoticeRevision.
OperationParameter.name: ecnList

OperationTemplate.description: This service operation gives information related to impacted objects such as activity, hull number etc for given list of Engineering Change Notice (ECNs). For each hull number, impacted activities along with Manufacturing Change Notice (MCNs) are returned and mcnIndication are returned

StructElement.description: Map of impacted activities and its associated information.

StructElement.name: unitInfoMap

StructElement.description: List of ecn objects impacting this activity.

Struct.description: ECN information for activites which are not impacted by current ECN and are coming from the MCN and its associated information.

StructElement.description: Map of mcn objects implementing current ECN and its associated activities information.
StructElement.name: implementingMCNInfo

StructElement.description: Map of mcn objects not implementing current ECN and its associated activities information. Map with null key represents activities which do not have any active MCN.

Typedef.description: A map with non-impacted activities as key and structure containing its impacting ecn objects as value. Valid key type is Mpr0Activity.
Typedef.name: ActivityToECNMap

Typedef.description: A map with impacted activities as key and structure containing its impacting elements information as value. Valid key type is Mpr0Activity.
Typedef.name: ActivityToImpactingElementsInfoMap

Typedef.description: A map with key as ECN business object of type ChangeNoticeRevision and value as structure containing impacted objects details
